song.title: Arise My Soul Arise
song.author: Charles Wesley
song.lyrics: [V1] 1) Arise, my soul, arise! Shake off thy guilty fears; The bleeding Sacrifice In my behalf appears.|| Before the throne my Surety stands, My name is written on His hands, My name is written on His hands. [V2] 2) He ever lives above, For me to intercede; His all-redeeming love, His precious blood to plead.|| His blood was shed for all our race, And sprinkles now the throne of grace, And sprinkles now the throne of grace. [v3] 3) Five bleeding wounds He bears, Received on Calvary; They pour effectual prayers; They strongly speak for me.|| “Forgive him, Oh, forgive” they cry, “Nor let that ransomed sinner die! Nor let that ransomed sinner die!” [v4] 4) The Father hears Him pray, His dear anointed One; He cannot turn away The presence of His Son.|| His Spirit answers to the blood, And tells me I am born of God, And tells me I am born of God. [v5] 5) To God I’m reconciled, His pardoning voice I hear; He owns me for His child, I can no longer fear.|| With confidence I now draw nigh, And “Father, Abba, Father,” cry, And “Father, Abba, Father,” cry.
